title: Troops Before Politicians Act
stage_label: Referred to the House Committee on House Administration.
crs_summary: Troops Before Politicians Act This bill withholds the pay of Members of Congress if active service members of the Armed Forces are not receiving pay, including as a result of a lapse in appropriations (i.e., a government shutdown). The withheld pay of Members must be deposited into an escrow account and released when the military lapse in pay ends.
last_action_text: Referred to the House Committee on House Administration.
